import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let curr = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and val <= curr
      result = list.push(result, val)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, curr)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, val)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    let val = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, val)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let sorted = sort_list(nums)
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let val = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  print(output)
  Ok(())
end
